summary: Iteration 12 - Reports Page Testing Complete. All features working correctly: login, navigation, 4 summary cards with real data, AI Portfolio Insights (powered by Gemini LLM), project comparison table with search/filter/sort, project row click navigation, and role-based access control.
passed_tests: Login with admin credentials (don@ddconsult.tech / Welcome123!) - successful
Navigate to /reports via sidebar 'Reports' link - successful
4 Summary cards display with real data: Total Budget (800h), Total Actual (27h), Variance (-773h), At Risk (0)
Project comparison table loads with 15 project rows showing project name, client, budget, actual, variance, % used, health badge
Search functionality filters projects by name/client - tested with 'FX1', filtered correctly to matching projects
Health filter dropdown works - tested 'On Track', 'All Projects' filters
Sortable column headers work - tested Budget, % Used columns
AI Portfolio Insights section loads with narrative, alerts, recommendations, project highlights
Clicking project row (FX1) navigates to /projects/{project_id} detail page
GET /api/reports/planned-vs-actual/overview returns 200 with summary and projects array
GET /api/ai/portfolio-budget-analysis returns 200 with AI analysis (narrative, alerts, recommendations, highlights)
Role-based access: 'resource' role user (amrit@ddconsult.tech) does NOT see Reports nav item and is redirected when accessing /reports directly
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing data with 15 active/pipeline projects, 800h total budget, 27h actual
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports page is complete and fully functional. Key components: /app/frontend/src/pages/Reports.js with data-testid attributes for all major elements (reports-page, summary-*, ai-portfolio-analysis, portfolio-narrative, project-comparison-table, reports-search, health-filter, project-row-*). Backend endpoints: GET /api/reports/planned-vs-actual/overview (summary + projects array), GET /api/ai/portfolio-budget-analysis (AI-powered analysis using Emergent LLM). Role restriction at UI level for admin/super_admin only - API allows any authenticated user.

response_structure.summary: total_projects, total_budget, total_actual, total_planned, overall_variance, overall_pct_used, projects_on_track/at_risk/over_budget/no_budget
response_structure.projects: array of project rows with project_id, project_name, client_name, budgeted_hours, actual_hours, variance_hours, budget_used_pct, health
